title: Celebrating Sealaska’s Women’s Week with our Female Board Members

title: Haida Scientist Defies Stereotypes, Encourages Local Kids To Do The Same
summary: Close your eyes. Clear your mind. When you hear the word ‘scientist,’ who do you envision? Is it an ‘old guy,’ with ‘crazy hair’ in a ‘lab coat’ with ‘glasses’? Is he ‘white’? title: Entrepreneurialism Provides Catalyst for Growth for Caitlin Way
summary: Caitlin Way never had any intention of being an entrepreneur. Even after becoming a business owner, she had a hard time embracing the identity. title: Board votes to increase scholarship endowment fund
summary: In a resolution adopted Friday, Oct. 30, Sealaska’s board of directors voted to add an additional $2.5 million to its scholarship endowment fund to meet the increased demand for support from students receiving postsecondary education on a part-time basis.
